identity.title: Sample And Hold With Droop Leakage
identity.supported_scope: pure voltage-domain event-driven transient behavioral Verilog-A

parameters.name: vth
parameters.override_behavior: sets sample and rst voltage-coded logic threshold

parameters.name: decay
parameters.override_behavior: sets the multiplicative held-value retention factor per leakage update

parameters.name: leak_period
parameters.override_behavior: sets the periodic leakage update interval

properties.observable_contract: Each rising sample crossing while reset is inactive captures the instantaneous vin voltage into the held state.
Between sample and leakage events, vout reflects the retained held state rather than continuously tracking vin.
At every leak_period update while reset is inactive, the held value is multiplied by decay.
Active reset clears the held state to 0 V at sampling or leakage update events.
Vout approaches each held-state target with the finite transition smoothing set by tr.

modeling_constraints: Use deterministic event-driven voltage-domain sample and leakage updates.
Use voltage contributions only; do not use current contributions, ddt(), or idt().
Do not add validation hooks, hidden observables, or simulator-specific side channels.
